title: 3-Day Zanzibar Beach Escape
summary: Short Indian Ocean beach itinerary based around Nungwi relaxation, light island touring, and sunset experiences.
description: A compact Zanzibar break designed for travelers who want a clean beach-resort structure with enough time for leisure, culture, and a signature dhow-sunset moment.

days.title: Arrival in Zanzibar and Nungwi beach time
days.summary: Arrive on the island, transfer north to Nungwi, and settle into a beach resort with the rest of the day at leisure.

days.title: Stone Town culture and sunset dhow experience
days.summary: Balance a relaxed beach morning with a cultural outing and a classic sunset cruise on the Indian Ocean.

days.title: Morning at leisure and departure
days.summary: Enjoy a final swim or slow breakfast before your transfer to the airport or onward island extension.
